neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.STS0131AcceptanceCriteria

Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization
 

  • Uses of STS0131AcceptanceCriteria in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization that return STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria.setEstimatedTimeToRuptureS(double estimatedTimeToRuptureS)
    Sets the estimated time to rupture for the fire-exposed item.
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria.setMaximumEscalatedFireRateKgPerS(double maximumEscalatedFireRateKgPerS)
    Sets the maximum acceptable escalated fire rate represented by the discharge rate.
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria.setMaximumPressureAtRuptureBara(double maximumPressureAtRuptureBara)
    Sets the maximum acceptable pressure at the limiting time.
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria.setMaximumRemainingMassKg(double maximumRemainingMassKg)
    Sets the maximum acceptable remaining inventory at the limiting time.
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria.setTimeToEscapeS(double timeToEscapeS)
    Sets the personnel escape time used as one possible limiting time.
    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization with parameters of type STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    STS0131AcceptanceResult
    DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult.evaluateSTS0131(STS0131AcceptanceCriteria criteria)
    Evaluate this depressurization result against STS0131 fire escalation acceptance criteria.
